requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Brunei BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为文莱BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為汶萊BESS項目驗收的國際預期基準

summary.en: Brunei does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation requiring pre-shipment conformity certification equivalent to Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route or the EU Battery Regulation. The National Standards Centre (NSC), under the Department of Standards (DSM) within the Ministry of Finance and Economy, is Brunei's national standards body. NSC adopts international standards including IEC standards. However, no confirmed mandatory NSC technical regulation specifically listing stationary BESS as a regulated product category has been identified from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. Project specifications in Brunei for utility-scale and C&I storage are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. Exporters should verify the current NSC regulated-product list and any DES equipment-approval requirements directly with the relevant authority before shipment.
summary.zh: 文莱目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，要求装运前合格评定认证（与沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》相当）。国家标准中心（NSC）隶属于财政经济部标准局（DSM），是文莱国家标准机构。NSC采用包括IEC标准在内的国际标准。然而，截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源确认NSC强制性技术法规专门将固定式BESS列为受监管产品类别。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。文莱公用事业规模和工商业储能项目规格预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。出口商在出货前应直接向相关主管机关核实现行NSC受监管产品清单及任何DES设备审批要求。
summary.zht: 汶萊目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，要求裝運前合格評定認證（與沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》相當）。國家標準中心（NSC），隸屬於財政經濟部標準局（DSM），是汶萊國家標準機構。NSC採用包括IEC標準在內的國際標準。然而，截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源確認NSC強制性技術法規專門將固定式BESS列為受監管產品類別。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。汶萊公用事業規模和工商業儲能項目規格預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。出口商在出貨前應直接向相關主管機關核實現行NSC受監管產品清單及任何DES設備審批要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Brunei project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

NSC (National Standards Centre), Department of Standards (DSM), Ministry of Finance and Economy, Brunei — national standards body; verify current regulated-product list directly (no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific Technical Regulation as of dataset date)
DES (Department of Electrical Services) — verify if any equipment type-approval requirement applies to BESS inverters or battery systems for Brunei grid connection

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in electrical energy storage. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Brunei project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance, as Chinese domestic certification alone is not sufficient for Brunei project acceptance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为电化学储能中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被文莱项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据，因为仅持有中国国内认证不足以满足文莱项目验收要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為電化學儲能中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被汶萊項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據，因為僅持有中國國內認證不足以滿足汶萊項目驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Brunei project specifications for utility-scale and C&I storage are expected to reference IEC 62619 as the safety evidence baseline for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current NSC regulated-product list and any DES equipment-approval obligations directly with the relevant authority before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Brunei BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition (currently IEC 62619:2022) referenced in project specifications before committing to a test programme; (d) note that IEC 62619 test results obtained under Chinese laboratory accreditation (CNAS) are acceptable provided the laboratory holds ILAC mutual recognition arrangement (MRA) accreditation for the relevant test scope.
gap.zh: 关键差距：文莱公用事业规模和工商业储能项目规格预计将以IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的安全证据基准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）在出货前直接向相关主管机关核实现行NSC受监管产品清单及任何DES设备审批义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至文莱BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本（目前为IEC 62619:2022）；（d）注意如实验室持有相关测试范围的ILAC互认协议（MRA）认可，在中国实验室认可（CNAS）下获得的IEC 62619测试结果可被接受。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：汶萊公用事業規模和工商業儲能項目規格預計將以IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的安全證據基準。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）在出貨前直接向相關主管機關核實現行NSC受監管產品清單及任何DES設備審批義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至汶萊BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本（目前為IEC 62619:2022）；（d）注意如實驗室持有相關測試範圍的ILAC互認協議（MRA）認可，在中國實驗室認可（CNAS）下獲得的IEC 62619測試結果可被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where DES or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; NSC mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with NSC and DES
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation requiring pre-shipment certification has been identified for Brunei as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Brunei project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Brunei project acceptance. Verify NSC current regulated-product scope and DES equipment-approval requirements; confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尚未确认文莱存在要求装运前认证的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是文莱项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足文莱项目验收要求。核实NSC现行受监管产品范围和DES设备审批要求；出货前向项目业主及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尚未確認汶萊存在要求裝運前認證的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是汶萊項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足汶萊項目驗收要求。核實NSC現行受監管產品範圍和DES設備審批要求；出貨前向項目業主及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: BMS Requirements and Thermal Management Performance in Tropical Climate
requirement_topic.zh: BMS要求及热带气候下的热管理性能
requirement_topic.zht: BMS要求及熱帶氣候下的熱管理性能

summary.en: The Battery Management System (BMS) is a critical safety component of any BESS. International standards including IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 require BMS functions covering cell voltage and temperature monitoring, overcharge and over-discharge protection, over-temperature protection, cell balancing, and state of health monitoring. For BESS deployed in Brunei's tropical climate — typically 28–35°C ambient with relative humidity frequently exceeding 80% — the BMS must be validated to maintain cells within safe operating limits under local ambient conditions, not just under Chinese standard test conditions (typically 25°C). Thermal management system derating under Brunei's ambient conditions must be demonstrated. No publicly confirmed Brunei-specific BMS technical requirement has been identified as of the dataset date — project specifications or DES connection conditions are the expected source of any Brunei-specific BMS requirements. Exporters should confirm BMS functional requirements with the project owner and DES before equipment procurement.
summary.zh: 电池管理系统（BMS）是任何BESS的关键安全组件。包括IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2在内的国际标准要求BMS具备电芯电压和温度监控、过充和过放保护、过温保护、电芯均衡及健康状态监控功能。对于部署于文莱热带气候的BESS——典型环境温度28–35°C，相对湿度频繁超过80%——BMS须经过验证，在当地环境条件下（而不仅在中国标准测试条件下，通常为25°C）将电芯保持在安全工作限值内。须证明热管理系统在文莱环境条件下的降额性能。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认文莱专项BMS技术要求——项目规格或DES并网条件是任何文莱专项BMS要求的预期来源。出口商在设备采购前应向项目业主和DES确认BMS功能要求。
summary.zht: 電池管理系統（BMS）是任何BESS的關鍵安全組件。包括IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2在內的國際標準要求BMS具備電芯電壓和溫度監控、過充和過放保護、過溫保護、電芯均衡及健康狀態監控功能。對於部署於汶萊熱帶氣候的BESS——典型環境溫度28–35°C，相對濕度頻繁超過80%——BMS須經過驗證，在當地環境條件下（而不僅在中國標準測試條件下，通常為25°C）將電芯保持在安全工作限值內。須證明熱管理系統在汶萊環境條件下的降額性能。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認汶萊專項BMS技術要求——項目規格或DES併網條件是任何汶萊專項BMS要求的預期來源。出口商在設備採購前應向項目業主和DES確認BMS功能要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (BMS safety function requirements including protection against overcharge, over-discharge, over-temperature)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level BMS and thermal management safety requirements)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods (BMS performance parameters and testing)

summary.en: Chinese BMS requirements for grid-connected BESS are defined in GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023. Chinese BMS test validation is typically performed under Chinese standard conditions (25°C ambient, standard humidity). Chinese BMS products are validated by NEA-authorised laboratories under Chinese standards. Chinese BMS software and communication protocols may not be configured for integration with Brunei DES SCADA or monitoring systems. Additionally, Chinese BESS thermal management systems are designed and validated for Chinese domestic climate conditions, which differ significantly from Brunei's tropical environment. Supplementary thermal performance evidence under tropical conditions is required for Brunei deployment.
summary.zh: 中国并网BESS的BMS要求在GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023中规定。中国BMS测试验证通常在中国标准条件下进行（25°C环境温度、标准湿度）。中国BMS产品由NEA授权实验室依据中国标准进行验证。中国BMS软件和通信协议可能未配置为与文莱DES SCADA或监控系统集成。此外，中国BESS热管理系统是针对中国国内气候条件设计和验证的，与文莱热带环境存在显著差异。文莱部署须提供热带条件下的补充热性能证据。
summary.zht: 中國併網BESS的BMS要求在GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023中規定。中國BMS測試驗證通常在中國標準條件下進行（25°C環境溫度、標準濕度）。中國BMS產品由NEA授權實驗室依據中國標準進行驗證。中國BMS軟件和通訊協議可能未配置為與汶萊DES SCADA或監控系統集成。此外，中國BESS熱管理系統是針對中國國內氣候條件設計和驗證的，與汶萊熱帶環境存在顯著差異。汶萊部署須提供熱帶條件下的補充熱性能證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (BMS functional and performance requirements for grid-connected BESS in China)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (BMS communication and integration requirements for BESS connected to distribution networks in China)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese BMS validation under Chinese standard ambient conditions does not demonstrate adequacy for Brunei's tropical environment. Key gaps: (a) thermal performance evidence — provide BMS and thermal management system performance analysis under Brunei's tropical ambient conditions (28–35°C, >80% RH); demonstrate that cell temperatures remain within safe operating limits during peak ambient summer periods; (b) SCADA/communication integration — confirm BMS communication interface (Modbus, IEC 61850, or project-specific protocol) with DES and project owner before equipment specification is finalised; (c) humidity and anti-condensation — confirm BMS electronics and enclosure are rated for Brunei's humidity conditions; provide evidence of protection against condensation inside BESS enclosures; (d) BMS firmware localisation — confirm BMS protection thresholds and alarm setpoints comply with Brunei DES connection conditions once those are confirmed.
gap.zh: 差距：在中国标准环境条件下验证的中国BMS无法证明对文莱热带环境的充分性。主要差距：（a）热性能证据——提供BMS和热管理系统在文莱热带环境条件下（28–35°C、>80% RH）的性能分析；证明在环境峰值高温期间电芯温度保持在安全工作限值内；（b）SCADA/通信集成——在设备规格最终确定前向DES和项目业主确认BMS通信接口（Modbus、IEC 61850或项目专属协议）；（c）湿度和防冷凝——确认BMS电子元件和外壳适用于文莱湿度条件；提供BESS外壳内防冷凝保护证据；（d）BMS固件本地化——在确认文莱DES并网条件后，确认BMS保护阈值和报警定值符合DES并网条件。
gap.zht: 差距：在中國標準環境條件下驗證的中國BMS無法證明對汶萊熱帶環境的充分性。主要差距：（a）熱性能證據——提供BMS和熱管理系統在汶萊熱帶環境條件下（28–35°C、>80% RH）的性能分析；證明在環境峰值高溫期間電芯溫度保持在安全工作限值內；（b）SCADA/通訊集成——在設備規格最終確定前向DES和項目業主確認BMS通訊接口（Modbus、IEC 61850或項目專屬協議）；（c）濕度和防冷凝——確認BMS電子元件和外殼適用於汶萊濕度條件；提供BESS外殼內防冷凝保護證據；（d）BMS韌體本地化——在確認汶萊DES併網條件後，確認BMS保護閾值和報警定值符合DES併網條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — BMS safety functions are required by IEC 62619 and expected in DES connection conditions and project specifications; tropical climate performance evidence is a project-specific requirement for Brunei deployment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — BMS requirements are defined in GB/T 36558-2023 for all grid-connected BESS in China; Chinese standard conditions do not cover Brunei tropical ambient requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BMS validation under Chinese standard conditions does not demonstrate adequacy for Brunei's tropical climate. Provide supplementary thermal performance analysis for Brunei's 28–35°C, >80% RH conditions. Confirm BMS communication protocol with DES and project owner. Ensure BMS electronics and enclosures are rated for tropical humidity. Confirm BMS protection thresholds against DES connection conditions once those are available. IEC 62619 BMS safety function evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected in Brunei project specifications — Chinese GB documentation alone is not sufficient.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在中国标准条件下验证的中国BMS无法证明对文莱热带气候的充分性。需提供文莱28–35°C、>80% RH条件下的补充热性能分析。向DES和项目业主确认BMS通信协议。确保BMS电子元件和外壳适用于热带湿度。在DES并网条件确认后，核实BMS保护阈值符合要求。文莱项目规格中预计需要ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619 BMS安全功能证据——仅中国GB文件不足以满足要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在中國標準條件下驗證的中國BMS無法證明對汶萊熱帶氣候的充分性。需提供汶萊28–35°C、>80% RH條件下的補充熱性能分析。向DES和項目業主確認BMS通訊協議。確保BMS電子元件和外殼適用於熱帶濕度。在DES併網條件確認後，核實BMS保護閾值符合要求。汶萊項目規格中預計需要ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619 BMS安全功能證據——僅中國GB文件不足以滿足要求。
